imageAltTags.fail: Add descriptive alt tags to all images.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: By using this application, you accept these privacy rules. We process personal data lawfully, fairly, and transparently, in line with GDPR and Croatian law.

dataProtection.title: Protection and Security of Personal Data
dataProtection.p1: Magićmarinac d.o.o. is the data controller and applies appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, loss, misuse, or destruction.
dataProtection.p2: Personal data means any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person, and processing includes collection, storage, use, sharing, restriction, and deletion.

processing.title: How We Process Data
processing.p1: We collect data that users submit directly (for example, contact and service-request information), and limited technical data such as IP address, browser information, and interaction signals used for security and service quality.
processing.p2: We may use anti-abuse protection services to prevent spam and automated misuse. If we need to process data for a new purpose, we will request additional consent where required.

retention.title: Retention Period
retention.p1: Data retention depends on the processing purpose and legal obligations. Data processed on the basis of consent is retained while consent and purpose remain valid, or until consent is withdrawn.
retention.p2: After the retention period ends or the purpose no longer exists, data is deleted or anonymized, unless longer retention is required by law.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.p1: You may request access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection, or portability of your personal data, in accordance with GDPR.
rights.p2: Requests can be sent to info@magicmarinac.hr. We respond within the legally prescribed period and may request additional information to verify identity.

cookies.title: Cookies and Analytics
cookies.p1: We use essential cookies for core functionality and may use functional, analytics, or advertising cookies to improve user experience and understand usage patterns.
cookies.p2: You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings. Disabling certain cookies may limit some features.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using this application and related services, users confirm they have read, understood, and accepted these terms.

acceptance.title: General Conditions
acceptance.p1: These terms govern access to and use of the application. Users must use the service lawfully and must not attempt to compromise security, availability, or data integrity.
acceptance.p2: We may update terms when needed to reflect legal, technical, or operational changes. Continued use after updates indicates acceptance of the revised terms.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.p1: All published materials, software elements, branding, and content are protected by applicable copyright and related rights.
ip.p2: Without prior written permission, users may not copy, redistribute, modify, or commercially exploit protected content outside legally permitted use.

liability.title: Liability and Service Availability
liability.p1: The service is provided on an 'as available' basis. We strive for reliability, but uninterrupted availability and error-free operation cannot always be guaranteed.
liability.p2: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect damages arising from temporary unavailability, third-party services, or circumstances beyond reasonable control.

dataRights.title: Personal Data Rights
dataRights.p1: Users may exercise rights related to personal data processing, including access, correction, deletion, restriction, objection, and portability where applicable.
dataRights.p2: For personal-data questions or rights requests, contact info@magicmarinac.hr.

refund.title: Refund and Cancellation Policy
refund.intro: This policy explains cancellation and refund conditions for digital services provided through this application.

scope.title: Scope
scope.p1: Our services are digital and delivered electronically. By placing an order, users acknowledge that fulfillment can begin immediately after successful payment and required input submission.
scope.p2: Refund eligibility depends on whether the service has been delivered, whether work has started, and whether legal or contractual exceptions apply.

nonDelivery.title: Non-Delivery or Major Service Failure
nonDelivery.p1: If we fail to deliver the purchased digital service within the stated timeframe due to reasons under our control, users may request a proportionate refund or full refund depending on delivery status.
nonDelivery.p2: If only part of the service has been delivered, the refund amount may be adjusted based on the completed portion.

userCancellation.title: User-Initiated Cancellation
userCancellation.p1: Users may request cancellation before service execution starts. Once digital delivery has begun or a custom service has been substantially performed, cancellation rights may be limited.
userCancellation.p2: Where legally required, any mandatory consumer rights under applicable law remain unaffected.

howToRequest.title: How to Request a Refund or Cancellation
howToRequest.p1: Submit your request by email to info@magicmarinac.hr with your order details, contact data, and reason for the request.
howToRequest.p2: Each request is reviewed individually. We respond within 3 business days of receiving your request. When approved, refunds are issued to the original payment method within 2 business days of approval.

delivery.title: Delivery and Fulfillment Policy
delivery.intro: This policy describes how and when digital services are delivered after purchase.

digitalDelivery.title: Digital Delivery Method
digitalDelivery.p1: Services are delivered digitally via email, platform access, downloadable materials, or another agreed electronic channel.
digitalDelivery.p2: No physical shipping is involved unless explicitly stated for a specific offer.

serviceTiming.title: Fulfillment Timing
serviceTiming.p1: Standard digital deliverables are typically provided within 1 to 5 business days after payment confirmation and receipt of all required project inputs.
serviceTiming.p2: For complex or custom work, timeline estimates are shared separately and fulfillment depends on scope, complexity, and user responsiveness.

clientResponsibilities.title: Client Responsibilities
clientResponsibilities.p1: Users are responsible for providing accurate information, required materials, and timely feedback needed for successful delivery.
clientResponsibilities.p2: Delays caused by missing or late user input may extend fulfillment timelines.

support.title: Delivery Support and Issues
support.p1: If you do not receive your deliverables within the expected timeframe, contact us at info@magicmarinac.hr so we can investigate and resolve the issue.
support.p2: If a delivery issue cannot be reasonably resolved, available remedies will follow applicable law and our refund and cancellation policy.

adMatch.title: Ad copy ↔ landing page relevance

content.altFix: Add descriptive alt text to all important images.

aeo.aiSearchOpportunityText: Optimizing for AI search engines could increase your featured snippet appearances by ~{{snippetChance}}%. AI-driven queries now represent ~{{aiQueryShare}}% of all searches.

aeo.technicalFixGuideHint: Click "Technical Fix Guide" on any failing check for step-by-step instructions
aeo.schemaMarkupDescription: Ready-to-copy JSON-LD code generated from your page content.
aeo.contentGapDescription: Checks whether your page content is structured for AI retrieval. It compares your title, H1, meta description, and body copy to detect misaligned headlines, implicit-only capabilities, missing concrete facts, and lack of machine-readable markup — the most common reasons AI engines skip or misclassify a page.
aeo.noSemanticFindings: No significant semantic gaps detected. Content positioning appears coherent.

geo.generativeEngineImpactText: Optimizing for generative engines could increase your AI citations by ~{{citationBoost}}%, potentially driving ~{{trafficPotential}} additional AI-referred visits per month.
geo.disclaimer: * Estimates based on generative AI search trends. Pages optimized for GEO are up to 40% more likely to be cited in AI responses.

brokenLinks.equityLossText: {{count}} broken links are leaking approximately {{equityLoss}}% of your page's link equity, negatively impacting your search rankings.
brokenLinks.disclaimer: * Each broken link wastes crawl budget and loses link equity that could boost your rankings.

images.pageSpeedImpactText: Optimizing your images could reduce page load time by ~{{loadReduction}}s, potentially improving conversion rates by ~{{conversionBoost}}%.
images.disclaimer: * Every 1s improvement in load time increases conversions by ~7% on average (Google/Deloitte study).
images.noImagesFound: No images found on this page.

internalLinks.internalAuthorityDistributionText: Improving your internal linking structure could boost page authority distribution by ~{{authorityBoost}}% and improve crawl efficiency by ~{{crawlImprovement}}%.
internalLinks.disclaimer: * Strong internal linking helps search engines discover and index pages more effectively, distributing ranking power across your site.

sitemap.crawlAndIndexingEfficiencyText: Fixing sitemap and robots.txt issues could improve crawl efficiency by ~{{crawlBoost}}% and help search engines index ~{{indexBoost}}% more of your pages.
sitemap.disclaimer: * Proper sitemap and robots.txt configuration ensures search engines can efficiently find and index all your important pages.
sitemap.llmsTxtDesc: Guides AI language models about your site content and what they are permitted to use.
sitemap.llmsFullTxtDesc: Extended AI context file with complete content details for LLMs.
sitemap.llmInfoJsonDesc: Machine-readable metadata about your site for AI systems.
sitemap.knowledgeEndpointDesc: Structured knowledge API for AI systems (/api/ai/knowledge.json or WordPress /wp-json/ai/v1/knowledge).

seo.metaTitleFix: Write a title between 30-60 characters. Include your primary keyword near the beginning.
seo.metaDescriptionFix: Write a description between 120-160 characters. Include your primary keyword and a call-to-action.
seo.h1FixMissing: Add exactly one H1 tag containing your primary keyword.
seo.h1FixMultiple: Use only one H1 tag per page. Move additional H1s to H2 or H3 tags.
seo.internalLinksRecommendation: Add more internal links (aim for 5+) to help search engines discover and index your pages.
seo.keywordPhrasesHelp: Multi-word phrases reveal the actual topics search engines associate with your page.
seo.keywordPhrasesTip: These phrases should align with your target search queries. If your primary keywords do not appear here, use them more naturally in your content.
seo.keywordDensityTip: Ideal keyword density is 1-3%. Too high may trigger keyword stuffing penalties; too low means weak optimization.

features: Ad copy quality score: headlines + descriptions

faq.heading: Everything you need to know before you scan
faq.subheading: Straight answers about what FreeSiteAnalyzer checks, what you get at each tier, and how the fixes work.

whatIsFreeSiteAnalyzer.q: What is FreeSiteAnalyzer and how does it audit my website's SEO?
whatIsFreeSiteAnalyzer.a: FreeSiteAnalyzer is an 8-in-1 SEO and AI-readiness scanner. You paste a URL and within ~30 seconds we audit your page across classic SEO, technical SEO, Google Ads landing-page quality, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini), and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) — then we tell you exactly what's broken and what to fix.

whatChecked.q: What does a full SEO audit check — and what does FreeSiteAnalyzer analyze on my page?
whatChecked.a: Every scan runs all eight pillars: on-page SEO (title, meta, headings, content), technical SEO (status codes, robots, sitemap, crawlability), Core Web Vitals & performance, mobile-friendliness, structured data (JSON-LD / schema.org), Google Ads landing-page quality plus an ad-copy quality rater for your headlines and descriptions, AEO readiness for AI answer engines, and GEO readiness for generative search.

adCopyRater.q: How do I improve my Google Ads Quality Score and ad rank?
adCopyRater.a: Paste your Google Ads headlines and descriptions into FreeSiteAnalyzer and we rate ad-copy quality the way Google does: keyword relevance, intent match, clarity, character-budget efficiency, CTA strength, and how well your copy aligns with the landing page it points to. You get a per-asset score and concrete rewrites that lift Quality Score, Ad Rank, and CTR — and lower your cost per click.

howLong.q: How long does an SEO audit take with FreeSiteAnalyzer?
howLong.a: Most scans complete in 20–40 seconds. You'll see live progress as each pillar runs, and the full report appears as soon as the last check finishes — no waiting for an email.

freeVsPaid.q: Is there a free SEO audit tool that shows real issues, not just a teaser?
freeVsPaid.a: Yes — the free FreeSiteAnalyzer scan gives you the overall score, score per pillar, and the top 3 issues per section, so you actually see where you stand. Basic (€19) unlocks every finding plus a full PDF report and a competitor comparison. Pro (€29) adds copy-paste fixes and step-by-step technical guides for every issue.

basicVsPro.q: Should I buy FreeSiteAnalyzer Basic or Pro to fix my SEO?
basicVsPro.a: Basic is the full data report — all issues, all findings, full PDF, 3 scans. Pro is Basic plus the actual solutions: copy-paste meta tags, JSON-LD blocks, robots/sitemap snippets, and step-by-step instructions for every problem we find. If you want to fix things yourself or hand a clear task list to a developer, pick Pro. Pro also includes 10 scans so you can re-test after each fix.

aiReady.q: How do I rank in ChatGPT, Perplexity and Google AI Overviews?
aiReady.a: Our AEO and GEO pillars check exactly the signals AI answer engines use to cite a page: clear question-and-answer structure, factual freshness, schema.org markup, llms.txt, semantic HTML, and quotable content blocks. You'll see a separate AI-readiness score and the specific changes that improve your odds of being cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google's AI Overviews.

whoFor.q: Who should use FreeSiteAnalyzer — marketers, developers, or agencies?
whoFor.a: Marketers, founders, freelancers, developers, and agencies all use FreeSiteAnalyzer. Marketers and founders get a fast, honest read on Google rankings, Google Ads quality, and AI-engine visibility. Developers get copy-paste meta, schema, robots, and HTML snippets they can drop straight into the codebase. Agencies use the PDF report as a client-ready deliverable — no need to learn ten tools or commission a manual audit.

needSignup.q: Can I run an SEO audit without signing up or creating an account?
needSignup.a: Yes. Free scans require nothing — no email, no account, no card. Basic and Pro are one-time payments with no subscription, no recurring charges, and no account to manage. Your report is delivered by email and stays accessible from the link.

refund.q: Does FreeSiteAnalyzer offer a money-back guarantee on the SEO report?
refund.a: Yes. Both Basic and Pro come with a moneyback guarantee. If the report doesn't give you actionable insight, contact support and we refund you. One-time payment, no subscription, no fine print.

howFixes.q: How do I fix SEO issues fast — does FreeSiteAnalyzer give me ready-to-paste code?
howFixes.a: Yes. For every issue we find, Pro includes a ready-to-paste solution: the exact title tag, meta description, JSON-LD block, robots directive, image alt text, or HTML snippet your developer (or you) can drop straight into the site. Each fix comes with a short step-by-step explaining where it goes and why it matters.

upgradeCta.title: Start your free scan. Upgrade to Pro for the full fix list.
upgradeCta.description: Run a free scan in under 30 seconds — you'll see your overall score and the top issues. Upgrade to Pro €29 to unlock the complete PDF report, 10 scans, and copy-paste fixes for every problem we find.
upgradeCta.hint: No signup · One-time payment, no subscription · Moneyback guarantee
